vocab.example: Can you take notes during today's meeting?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể ghi chú trong buổi họp hôm nay không?

vocab.example: We have eight attendees for the planning meeting.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta có tám người tham dự buổi họp lên kế hoạch.

vocab.meaning_vi: lời xin vắng mặt (trong biên bản họp)
vocab.example: Please note apologies from Lan, who is on leave today.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng ghi nhận lời xin vắng mặt từ chị Lan, người đang nghỉ phép hôm nay.

vocab.example: I'll circulate the minutes by email this afternoon.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi sẽ gửi biên bản họp qua email vào chiều nay.

vocab.meaning_vi: để ghi vào biên bản (chính thức)
vocab.example: For the record, the team agreed to launch next month.
vocab.example_vi: Để ghi vào biên bản, đội đã đồng ý ra mắt vào tháng sau.

vocab.example: The manager needs to sign off on the minutes first.
vocab.example_vi: Quản lý cần phê duyệt biên bản họp trước.

vocab.meaning_vi: bản dự thảo biên bản họp
vocab.example: I've written the draft minutes for you to check.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đã viết bản dự thảo biên bản họp để bạn kiểm tra.

vocab.example: Let's recap the main decisions before we finish.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy tóm tắt lại các quyết định chính trước khi kết thúc.

lines.speaker: Minh (team lead)
lines.text: Hoa, could you take notes during today's meeting?

lines.speaker: Hoa (note-taker)
lines.text: Sure. Let me check the list of attendees first.

lines.speaker: Minh (team lead)
lines.text: We have eight attendees. Please note apologies from Lan, who is on leave today.

lines.speaker: Hoa (note-taker)
lines.text: Got it. I'll add that at the top of the minutes.

lines.speaker: Minh (team lead)
lines.text: Great. For the record, we agreed to move the launch to next month.

lines.speaker: Hoa (note-taker)
lines.text: Understood. I'll write that down as an official decision.

lines.speaker: Minh (team lead)
lines.text: Can you send me the draft minutes by tomorrow morning?

lines.speaker: Hoa (note-taker)
lines.text: Of course. I'll circulate them to the whole team too.

lines.speaker: Minh (team lead)
lines.text: Perfect. I need to sign off on them before they go out.

lines.speaker: Hoa (note-taker)
lines.text: No problem. Let's recap the main decisions before I finish writing.

lines.speaker: Minh (team lead)
lines.text: Sounds good. Thanks for handling this so carefully, Hoa.

lines.speaker: Hoa (note-taker)
lines.text: You're welcome. I'll have everything ready by noon tomorrow.

questions.q: What does Minh ask Hoa to do during the meeting?
Why is Lan absent from the meeting?
What does Minh need to do before the minutes go out?

shadowing: Could you take notes during today's meeting and list all the attendees?
Please note apologies from anyone who couldn't attend the meeting today.
For the record, the team agreed to move the launch date.
I'll circulate the draft minutes to the whole team this afternoon.
The manager needs to sign off on the minutes before we send them.
